title: Luscious Turkish Lamb Kazandibi
description: A delicious and unique Turkish dish made with lamb, water, and shio-koji, served in individual mini cocottes. This crisp and flavorful dish is perfect for a special occasion or dinner party.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Cold water is essential for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Shio-koji
ingredients.notes: Shio-koji adds a unique flavor to the dish.

instructions: Heat olive oil in individual mini cocottes over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the lamb and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the water, shio-koji, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Garnish with chopped dill and serve hot.
Let the dish cool to room temperature before serving.
